entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the crop evaluated for disease resistance

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease caused by Sclerospora graminicola affecting pearl millet

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet to resist infection by downy mildew

entities.name: SINGLE POT SCREENING
entities.description: A screening technique used on a limited number of seedlings to identify resistance

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENT
entities.description: An evaluation conducted in the field to test the performance of progenies

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The state in India where the field experiment was conducted

entities.name: WITHIN PROGENY SELECTION
entities.description: A selection process aimed at improving resistance within specific progenies

entities.name: INBREEDING PROCESS
entities.description: The process of mating closely related individuals to achieve homozygosity, during which selection occurs

entities.name: S2 AND S3 PROGENIES
entities.description: The second and third filial generations of pearl millet derived from screening
